sentence: I haven't been feeling well lately.
translation: No me he sentido bien últimamente.

sentence: She hasn't finished her research yet.
translation: Ella aún no ha terminado su investigación.

sentence: He hasn't responded to my email.
translation: Él no ha respondido a mi correo.

sentence: We haven't received any updates.
translation: No hemos recibido ninguna actualización.

sentence: They haven't met the new manager yet.
translation: Todavía no han conocido al nuevo gerente.

sentence: I will not tolerate this behavior.
translation: No toleraré este comportamiento.

sentence: She will not attend the conference.
translation: Ella no asistirá a la conferencia.

sentence: He will not agree with that proposal.
translation: Él no estará de acuerdo con esa propuesta.

sentence: We will not finish on time if we continue like this.
translation: No terminaremos a tiempo si seguimos así.

sentence: They will not participate in the project.
translation: No participarán en el proyecto.

sentence: I haven't understood the instructions properly.
translation: No he entendido bien las instrucciones.

sentence: She hasn't visited the new exhibition.
translation: Ella no ha visitado la nueva exposición.

sentence: He hasn't completed the assignment.
translation: Él no ha completado la tarea.

sentence: We haven't decided on the final plan.
translation: No hemos decidido el plan final.

sentence: They haven't sent the documents yet.
translation: Todavía no han enviado los documentos.

sentence: I won't allow this mistake to happen again.
translation: No permitiré que este error ocurra de nuevo.

sentence: She won't change her mind.
translation: Ella no cambiará de opinión.

sentence: He won't admit he was wrong.
translation: Él no admitirá que se equivocó.

sentence: We won't accept any excuses.
translation: No aceptaremos ninguna excusa.

sentence: They won't take part in the discussion.
translation: No participarán en la discusión.

sentence: I haven't been able to contact him.
translation: No he podido contactar con él.

sentence: She hasn't prepared for the presentation.
translation: Ella no se ha preparado para la presentación.

sentence: He hasn't practiced enough.
translation: Él no ha practicado lo suficiente.

sentence: We haven't considered all the options.
translation: No hemos considerado todas las opciones.

sentence: They haven't started the project yet.
translation: Todavía no han comenzado el proyecto.

sentence: I won't accept your proposal under these conditions.
translation: No aceptaré tu propuesta bajo estas condiciones.

sentence: She won't agree to compromise.
translation: Ella no aceptará comprometerse.

sentence: He won't cooperate with them.
translation: Él no cooperará con ellos.

sentence: We won't leave until the issue is resolved.
translation: No nos iremos hasta que se resuelva el problema.

sentence: They won't apologize for their actions.
translation: No se disculparán por sus acciones.

sentence: I haven't had time to review the report.
translation: No he tenido tiempo de revisar el informe.

sentence: She hasn't read the guidelines.
translation: Ella no ha leído las pautas.

sentence: He hasn't attended the meetings recently.
translation: Él no ha asistido a las reuniones recientemente.

sentence: We haven't analyzed the data thoroughly.
translation: No hemos analizado los datos a fondo.

sentence: They haven't made a final decision yet.
translation: Todavía no han tomado una decisión final.

sentence: I won't ignore this problem.
translation: No ignoraré este problema.

sentence: She won't hesitate to speak up.
translation: Ella no dudará en expresarse.

sentence: He won't let this opportunity slip away.
translation: Él no dejará escapar esta oportunidad.

sentence: We won't compromise on quality.
translation: No comprometeremos la calidad.

sentence: They won't take unnecessary risks.
translation: No correrán riesgos innecesarios.
